summary: Tested new UI/UX features: Post reactions (🤙 🌊 ❤️ 🔥), Messenger emoji picker, and MapPage shooter count sync. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly.

issues: Map tiles take 3+ seconds to load on initial render - consider adding loading skeleton

critical_code_review_comments: PostReaction API endpoints working correctly at /api/posts/{post_id}/reactions
Toggle behavior working - same emoji removes reaction
Feed.js ReactionPicker component displays on long-press with all 4 surf-themed reactions
MessagesPage.js EmojiPicker has beautiful category tabs (Recent, Surf, Faces, Gestures, Nature)
MapPage.js has useEffect at lines 203-211 to sync selectedSpot with surfSpots for persistent shooter count

test_credentials.note: sarah@waters.com does not exist - use photographer@surf.com instead

seed_data_creation: Added test reactions to posts during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post reactions feature fully implemented. Backend API at /api/posts/{post_id}/reactions validates emoji against ['🤙', '🌊', '❤️', '🔥']. Frontend Feed.js shows ReactionPicker on long-press (500ms). MessagesPage.js has EmojiPicker component with category tabs. MapPage.js shooter count persistence fixed with useEffect sync.

backend_tests: GET /api/posts - Reactions array included in response (PASSED)
Multiple users can add same emoji reaction (PASSED)
Same user can add multiple different emoji reactions (PASSED)
frontend_features_verified: Feed page loads with post cards (9 posts found)
Clicking reaction adds it to post
Reactions display inline with count (e.g., '🤙 2 reactions')
Messages page loads with Primary/Requests tabs
EmojiPicker button visible in message input area
EmojiPicker shows category tabs (Recent, Surf, Faces, Gestures, Nature)
EmojiPicker shows emoji grid with surfing emojis
Message input, media upload, and voice note buttons present
Message reactions display inline on messages
MapPage has selectedSpot sync effect for shooter count persistence

code_quality_notes.PostReaction model: Properly indexed with unique constraint on post_id, user_id, emoji
code_quality_notes.EmojiPicker component: Defined at MessagesPage.js lines 30-84 with 5 category tabs
code_quality_notes.MapPage sync effect: Lines 203-211 keeps selectedSpot in sync with surfSpots
